news.title: Already rich, already successful, why the last wave of tech winners is grinding again
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] They're rolling up their sleeves again, seemingly out of fear of missing AI's defining moment and, presumably, the irresistible allure of making even more money -- potentially a lot more.

news.title: Uber’s product chief on hotels, robotaxis, and why the company doesn’t want to be “everything for everyone”
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Uber Chief Product Officer Sachin Kansal walks TechCrunch through the company's financial-services ambitions, its increasingly complicated relationship with Waymo, its new AV Labs data operation, and how AI is starting to show up in ways riders and...

news.title: Video-generation startup PixVerse raises $439M, valuation soars past $2B
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] With the cash, the company aims to expand its world model offering and reach customers across geographies.

news.title: Hermes agent maker Nous Research in talks for new funding at $1.5B valuation
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] The company is raising at least $75 million, led by Robot Ventures, with significant participation from USV and other prominent investors.

news.title: Satya Nadella has issued a shocking warning to companies using AI
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Of all the debates raging about the potential downsides of AI, there is one worry causing the most hand-wringing among AI enthusiasts in Silicon Valley — that the giant AI labs that sell proprietary models are somehow acting like Trojan horses.

news.title: Dyson releases AI-powered Airwrap Coriolis 2x with Gen2 motor and automated curling system
news.description: [CLEVELAND.COM] Dyson's Airwrap Coriolis 2x uses artificial intelligence to create personalized curls based on your exact hair type.

news.title: Labels for Music Created With A.I. Could Join Explicit Lyrics Warnings
news.description: [THE NEW YORK TIMES] Major music industry groups, including the organization behind the Grammy Awards, have proposed labels for tracks made with some degree of artificial intelligence.

news.title: Ravee Optics raises $6 million to meet growing AI demand for faster data transfers in space
news.description: [TECHSTARTUPS.COM] Artificial intelligence is creating a new challenge beyond chips and data centers. As AI systems generate larger volumes of data and satellite networks continue to grow, moving information through space is becoming a major infrastructure problem....

news.title: Trump Is Snapping Up Stakes in Private Companies. Could A.I. Be Next?
news.description: [THE NEW YORK TIMES] Some tech executives are nervous that recent scrutiny of artificial intelligence models could be a prelude to a demand by the Trump administration for an ownership stake.

news.title: AI gives hackers ‘machine speed’ attack capability, faster than banks can respond: Report
news.description: [THE FINANCIAL EXPRESS] Artificial intelligence is allowing cybercriminals to launch sophisticated attacks at machine speed, making it harder for banks and financial institutions to keep pace, according to the Digital Threat Report 2025-26.

news.title: Meta Has Been Looking to Expand Its AI Capabilities. It Has Now Announced Plans on Invest $50 Billion on a New Data Center.
news.description: [INTERNATIONAL BUSINESS TIMES] Meta is dramatically expanding its largest artificial intelligence infrastructure project, increasing the planned investment in its Hyperion data center in rural Louisiana to more than $50 billion.

news.title: Economists warn of artificial intelligence impact on global economy
